title: valeriana crinii subsp. epirotica
intro: Valeriana crinii subsp. epirotica is a subspecies of the Valeriana crinii plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as valerian or all-heal. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and anxiolytic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of valepotriates and valerenic acid. The health benefits of Valeriana crinii subsp. epirotica include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress levels, and relief from restlessness and insomnia. Valeriana crinii subsp. epirotica can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and essential oils.
